title: mvanhorn/last30days-skill trends as an agent research workflow
friendlyTitle: mvanhorn/last30days-skill trends as an agent research workflow
summary: last30days-skill is an AI agent skill that researches a topic across public web and social sources, then synthesizes a grounded recent-history summary.
friendlySummary: last30days-skill is an AI agent skill that researches a topic across public web and social sources, then synthesizes a grounded recent-history summary.
whyItMatters: Use it as a pattern for building research agents that gather multiple signals before writing. It is especially relevant for monitoring markets, projects, competitors, or fast-moving technical topics.
